svg.title: J-UI-1 / J-UI-2 — Desktop shell with rendered Inbox digest cards
svg.desc: SupaWave J2CL desktop shell. Header with logo and search. Saved-search rail (Inbox/Mentions/Tasks/Public/Archive/Pinned), filter chip strip, six rendered wavy-search-rail-card digests with avatar stack, title, snippet, msg count, unread badge, relative timestamp. Center wave-region shows the selected wave header with action toolbar and a placeholder reading frame.

g.text: Sasha: I bumped the retry budget but we still see backoff after
five consecutive 502s on the streaming endpoint. Anyone seeing
Dan: design memo updated with the index-stamp invariant. Ready
for a second pass when you have a window today.
Marina: tasks rolled forward. Two carryovers from F-3. Tagged
Yuri and Sasha as owners — see the task list at the bottom.
Anton: pushed the welcome-wave copy. Final review tomorrow.
Pavel: 4/26 gates green; we need J-UI-1..8 closed before a re-vote.
Dan: p75 INP up 18% on /?view=j2cl-root since Tuesday's deploy.
Sasha — what's the actual retry budget after the F-3 cleanup? I'm
seeing logs that look like we're doubling up between the streaming
handler and the outer fetch. Repro is on prod-2 only.
17 more blips · 2 collapsed sub-threads · 1 task active
J-UI-1 · J-UI-2 · matrix R-3.5, R-4.5 · components: shell-root, wavy-search-rail, wavy-search-rail-card, shell-main-region · light theme · 1440×900
